title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents how logarithmic transformations of complex numbers can be applied to analyze and understand Escher's Print Gallery artwork. The video explores conformal maps, complex exponentials, and complex logarithms through animated visualizations of mathematical concepts.
